'''âr-p-m-r''' ('''karapmeroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beachball|beachball]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beachball|beachball]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-p-m-r
|-
! Lemma
| karapmeroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirapmeroko|thirapmeroko]] || [[word:jirapmeroko|jirapmeroko]] || [[word:shirapmeroko|shirapmeroko]] || [[word:kirapmeroko|kirapmeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurapmeroko|thuthurapmeroko]] || [[word:jujurapmeroko|jujurapmeroko]] || [[word:shushurapmeroko|shushurapmeroko]] || [[word:kukurapmeroko|kukurapmeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurapmeroko|thurapmeroko]] || [[word:jurapmeroko|jurapmeroko]] || [[word:shurapmeroko|shurapmeroko]] || [[word:kurapmeroko|kurapmeroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurapmeroko|thurapmeroko]] || [[word:jurapmeroko|jurapmeroko]] || [[word:shurapmeroko|shurapmeroko]] || [[word:kurapmeroko|kurapmeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therapmeroko|therapmeroko]] || [[word:jerapmeroko|jerapmeroko]] || [[word:sherapmeroko|sherapmeroko]] || [[word:kerapmeroko|kerapmeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorapmeroko|thothorapmeroko]] || [[word:jojorapmeroko|jojorapmeroko]] || [[word:shoshorapmeroko|shoshorapmeroko]] || [[word:kokorapmeroko|kokorapmeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorapmeroko|thorapmeroko]] || [[word:jorapmeroko|jorapmeroko]] || [[word:shorapmeroko|shorapmeroko]] || [[word:korapmeroko|korapmeroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorapmeroko|thorapmeroko]] || [[word:jorapmeroko|jorapmeroko]] || [[word:shorapmeroko|shorapmeroko]] || [[word:korapmeroko|korapmeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrapmeroko|thĂŠrapmeroko]] || [[word:jĂŠrapmeroko|jĂŠrapmeroko]] || [[word:shĂŠrapmeroko|shĂŠrapmeroko]] || [[word:kĂŠrapmeroko|kĂŠrapmeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharapmeroko|thatharapmeroko]] || [[word:jajarapmeroko|jajarapmeroko]] || [[word:shasharapmeroko|shasharapmeroko]] || [[word:kakarapmeroko|kakarapmeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharapmeroko|tharapmeroko]] || [[word:jarapmeroko|jarapmeroko]] || [[word:sharapmeroko|sharapmeroko]] || [[word:karapmeroko|karapmeroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharapmeroko|tharapmeroko]] || [[word:jarapmeroko|jarapmeroko]] || [[word:sharapmeroko|sharapmeroko]] || [[word:karapmeroko|karapmeroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
